title: Settings
subtitle: Application preferences, recording limits and storage.
languageHint: Choose the interface language. Takes effect immediately.
themeHint: Switch between light and dark mode.
demoHint: Demo storage units load only via the STORAGE_CONTROLLER_LOAD_DEMO_DATA flag or the seed-demo command. Production starts empty.
timezoneHint: Timestamps are stored in UTC and shown in this zone. Use an IANA name like Europe/Berlin.
recordingHint: Bounded recording keeps the database small. Quality and availability transitions are always recorded.
retentionHint: Raw samples are aggregated into 15-minute and hourly tiers before deletion.

banner.warning: Storage usage is high ({{pct}}% of budget). Review retention settings.
banner.critical: Storage usage is critical ({{pct}}%). Automatic cleanup is running.
banner.emergency: Storage emergency ({{pct}}%). Non-essential heartbeat samples are suspended; critical events are still recorded.
